name: Invesco CurrencyShares Canadian Dollar Trust
summary: PART I ITEM 1. B USINESS Overview The Invesco CurrencyShares Canadian Dollar Trust (the Trust) is a grantor trust that was formed on June 8, 2006. The Shares began trading on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol FXC on June 26, 2006. The primary listing of the Shares was transferred to NYSE Arca, Inc. (NYSE Arca) on October 30, 2007. The Trust issues shares (the Shares) in blocks of 50,000 (a Basket) in exchange for deposits of Canadian Dollars and distributes Canadian Dollars in ...
